title: Protocols for the Isolation of Lactic Acid Bacteria and Determination of the Inhibition Diameter
author: Valero, Antonio
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Video demonstrating the protocols for the isolation of lactic acid bacteria and the determination of the inhibition diameter using the spot-of-the-lawn agar test. Training video elaborated within the ArtiSaneFood project.
steps_raw: Video demonstrating the protocols for the isolation of lactic acid bacteria and the determination of the inhibition diameter using the spot-of-the-lawn agar test. Training video elaborated within the ArtiSaneFood project.
